categories.description: Staple grains and primary calorie sources such as rice, maize, and wheat.
Crops grown primarily for sale and profit, including potatoes and oilseeds.
Raw materials for industries, such as sugarcane, jute, tea, and coffee.
Protein-rich seeds like lentils, chickpeas, and beans.
Fresh produce including leafy greens, tomatoes, and seasonal vegetables.
Tropical and temperate fruits like mangoes, citrus, and apples.
Aromatic and medicinal plants such as ginger, cardamom, and turmeric.
Animal products including meat, milk, and eggs from cattle, goats, and birds.
Fodder and processed feed like rice bran, mustard cake, and straw.
Traditional and modern agricultural implements like ploughs and baskets.
